training.data: count-banana-plants (original farm) + 5 independent plantain datasets from another region (plantas_jovenes_50m/80m1, plantas_platano, prueba2rgb, etiquetasnuevas; ~5,147 new images, CC BY 4.0, Roboflow Universe)
training.leakage_control: dihedral-canonical perceptual-hash overlap check vs the original test/valid/train; forks of the original dataset (banana_counting, conteobanano) and non-aerial sets (ml_agromatica) were EXCLUDED

original_farm_test_50.note: Below the specialist ensemble (F1 0.892) on the original farm.

cross_farm_holdout_99.note: Held-out test splits of the 5 new farms (unseen images). The single-farm models score ~0 here.

role: GENERALIST / multi-farm model. Use it on farms other than the original one, or as the starting point for fine-tuning on a new farm. For the original farm the 3-model ensemble remains the max-accuracy config.
honest_tradeoff: Trained on 10x more diverse data: it gains an entirely new capability (works across farms; the specialists are blind outside their farm) at the cost of some accuracy on the original farm (mAP50 0.947 -> 0.877). Both models ship; pick per deployment.
